name: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access -- @1.4
fullName: Delete Eco News: Delete eco news by id with invalid or restricted access

steps.name: Given the user is authorized
When I send request to delete eco news with id "77"
Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message should be Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77

parameterValues: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77
